GetOperation.Name: Get
GetOperation.Description: Gets the properties of the specified machine learning workspace.

CreateOperation.Name: CreateOrUpdate
CreateOperation.Description: Creates or updates a workspace with the specified parameters.

UpdateOperation.Name: Update
UpdateOperation.Description: Updates a machine learning workspace with the specified parameters.

ListOperations.Name: GetAll
ListOperations.Description: Lists all the available machine learning workspaces under the specified resource group.

OperationsFromSubscriptionExtension.Description: Lists all the available machine learning workspaces under the specified subscription.

OtherOperations.Name: Diagnose
OtherOperations.Description: Diagnose workspace setup issue.

OtherOperations.Name: ListKeys
OtherOperations.Description: Lists all the keys associated with this workspace. This includes keys for the storage account, app insights and password for container registry

OtherOperations.Name: ResyncKeys
OtherOperations.Description: Resync all the keys associated with this workspace. This includes keys for the storage account, app insights and password for container registry

OtherOperations.Name: ListNotebookAccessToken
OtherOperations.Description: return notebook access token and refresh token

OtherOperations.Name: PrepareNotebook
OtherOperations.Description: Prepare a notebook.

OtherOperations.Name: ListStorageAccountKeys
OtherOperations.Description: List storage account keys of a workspace.

OtherOperations.Name: ListNotebookKeys
OtherOperations.Description: List keys of a notebook.

OtherOperations.Name: ListOutboundNetworkDependenciesEndpoints
OtherOperations.Description: Called by Client (Portal, CLI, etc) to get a list of all external outbound dependencies (FQDNs) programmatically.

OtherOperations.Name: List
OtherOperations.Description: Gets the private link resources that need to be created for a workspace.

OtherOperations.Name: List
OtherOperations.Description: Lists all enabled features for a workspace

GetOperation.Name: Get
GetOperation.Description: Gets compute definition by its name. Any secrets (storage keys, service credentials, etc) are not returned - use 'keys' nested resource to get them.

CreateOperation.Name: CreateOrUpdate
CreateOperation.Description: Creates or updates compute. This call will overwrite a compute if it exists. This is a nonrecoverable operation. If your intent is to create a new compute, do a GET first to verify that it does not exist yet.

UpdateOperation.Name: Update
UpdateOperation.Description: Updates properties of a compute. This call will overwrite a compute if it exists. This is a nonrecoverable operation.

OtherOperations.Name: UpdateCustomServices
OtherOperations.Description: Updates the custom services list. The list of custom services provided shall be overwritten

OtherOperations.Name: ListNodes
OtherOperations.Description: Get the details (e.g IP address, port etc) of all the compute nodes in the compute.

OtherOperations.Name: ListKeys
OtherOperations.Description: Gets secrets related to Machine Learning compute (storage keys, service credentials, etc).

OtherOperations.Name: Start
OtherOperations.Description: Posts a start action to a compute instance

OtherOperations.Name: Stop
OtherOperations.Description: Posts a stop action to a compute instance

OtherOperations.Name: Restart
OtherOperations.Description: Posts a restart action to a compute instance

OtherOperations.Name: UpdateIdleShutdownSetting
OtherOperations.Description: Updates the idle shutdown setting of a compute instance.

GetOperation.Name: Get
GetOperation.Description: Gets the specified private endpoint connection associated with the workspace.

CreateOperation.Name: CreateOrUpdate
CreateOperation.Description: Update the state of specified private endpoint connection associated with the workspace.

UpdateOperation.Name: Update
UpdateOperation.Description: Update the state of specified private endpoint connection associated with the workspace.

DeleteOperation.Name: Delete
DeleteOperation.Description: Deletes the specified private endpoint connection associated with the workspace.

ListOperations.Name: GetAll
ListOperations.Description: List all the private endpoint connections associated with the workspace.

ListOperations.Name: GetAll
ListOperations.Description: List data versions in the data container

ListOperations.Name: GetAll
ListOperations.Description: List data versions in the data container

OtherOperations.Name: Package
OtherOperations.Description: Model Version Package operation.

GetOperation.Name: Get
GetOperation.Description: Gets a batch inference endpoint by name.

ListOperations.Name: GetAll
ListOperations.Description: Lists Batch inference endpoint in the workspace.

OtherOperations.Name: ListKeys
OtherOperations.Description: Lists batch Inference Endpoint keys.

GetOperation.Name: Get
GetOperation.Description: Gets a batch inference deployment by id.

ListOperations.Name: GetAll
ListOperations.Description: Lists Batch inference deployments in the workspace.

OtherOperations.Name: ListSecrets
OtherOperations.Description: Get datastore secrets.

OtherOperations.Name: Backfill
OtherOperations.Description: Backfill.

OtherOperations.Name: GetFeature
OtherOperations.Description: Get feature.

OtherOperations.Name: ListFeatures
OtherOperations.Description: List Features.

OtherOperations.Name: ListMaterializationJobs
OtherOperations.Description: List materialization Jobs.

OtherOperations.Name: Cancel
OtherOperations.Description: Cancels a Job (asynchronous).

GetOperation.Name: Get
GetOperation.Description: Gets a labeling job by name/id.

CreateOperation.Name: CreateOrUpdate
CreateOperation.Description: Creates or updates a labeling job (asynchronous).

UpdateOperation.Name: Update
UpdateOperation.Description: Creates or updates a labeling job (asynchronous).

ListOperations.Name: GetAll
ListOperations.Description: Lists labeling jobs in the workspace.

OtherOperations.Name: ExportLabels
OtherOperations.Description: Export labels from a labeling job (asynchronous).

OtherOperations.Name: Pause
OtherOperations.Description: Pause a labeling job.

OtherOperations.Name: Resume
OtherOperations.Description: Resume a labeling job (asynchronous).

OtherOperations.Name: ListKeys
OtherOperations.Description: List EndpointAuthKeys for an Endpoint using Key-based authentication.

OtherOperations.Name: RegenerateKeys
OtherOperations.Description: Regenerate EndpointAuthKeys for an Endpoint using Key-based authentication (asynchronous).

OtherOperations.Name: GetToken
OtherOperations.Description: Retrieve a valid AAD token for an Endpoint using AMLToken-based authentication.

CreateOperation.Name: CreateOrUpdate
CreateOperation.Description: Create or update Inference Endpoint Deployment (asynchronous).

OtherOperations.Name: GetLogs
OtherOperations.Description: Polls an Endpoint operation.

OtherOperations.Name: ListSkus
OtherOperations.Description: List Inference Endpoint Deployment Skus.
